programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 1.2m and onshore breeze, Molhe Leste will offer some bumpy rides, and perhaps a good excuse for a swim.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The onshore wind will likely make those 1.2m waves a bit of a washing machine today.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With onshore wind and a 1.2m swell, today's session might be more aerobic than aquatic.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.2m swell might offer a few rideable moments before the crosswind turns it to chop soup.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
Lagide's 1.2m swell and crosswind suggest a workout, not a highlight reel; bring your swim fins.

programme.title: 🌊 2.7m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
With 2.7m and that wind, today's Ribeira session will likely be more exercise than enjoyment, unless you enjoy whitewater beatings.
🌊 Swell: 2.7m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 30.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 67.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 3.0m
